title: Cell parameters lost when upper module used with default and non-default parameters

features.name: parameterized module with default value
features.description: Code should include a module with a integer parameter that has a default value

features.name: nested module instantiation with parent parameter
features.description: Code should include a module that instantiates a child module using its own parameter value via #(N) syntax

features.name: transitive parameter propagation across module hierarchy
features.description: Code should include a three-level module hierarchy where top module passes non-default parameter to middle module, which passes its parameter to bottom module

features.name: unused module with conflicting default parameter
features.description: Code should include an unused parameterized module with default parameter value that conflicts with a used module's parameter override
